title: calopyxis malifolia
intro: Calopyxis malifolia, also known as the Ceylon olive tree, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka, characterized by its small, white flowers and edible fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Calopyxis malifolia is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
